name: @rhombus-std/config
description: Layered configuration engine: ConfigurationBuilder/Root/Section, compareConfigurationKeys, the Memory provider, an index-navigable Section tree, and a runtime schema (Schema/Infer/OPTIONAL) that coerces on build().
//configuration-builder-subpath: Sole remaining consumer: config's OWN with-type-augment.ts, which merges `declare module "@rhombus-std/config/configuration-builder"`. The provider packages (config.json/.env/.commandline/.file/.ini/.xml) now augment the barrel ("@rhombus-std/config") directly -- they are EXTERNAL to config, typechecking against its rolled, flat dist/index.d.ts where ConfigurationBuilder is declared directly (no re-export chain), so a barrel merge lands cleanly even with 2+ providers in one program. with-type-augment CANNOT do the same: it compiles INSIDE config's own program alongside memory/index.ts + chained/index.ts, which merge onto the DECLARING module via relative `../ConfigurationBuilder`. Routing the barrel back to src (a `config-source` on the `.` export) re-introduces the phantom split -- with-type on the src barrel's re-exported class vs memory/chained on the declaring module -- and `return this` fails (reproduced). A relative `./ConfigurationBuilder` typechecks but does NOT survive rollup-plugin-dts: it is rewritten to a self-referential `declare module "./with-type-augment"`, so external with-type-augment consumers never get `withType` on the real builder. So this subpath stays: `config-source` (listed FIRST, ahead of `types`) resolves it to ./src/ConfigurationBuilder.ts for config's OWN program -- the concrete declaring module, matching memory/chained -- while every external consumer (no `config-source` set) resolves `types` -> the rolled ./dist/index.d.ts (flat, class declared directly), and with-type-augment's rolled dist keeps the `declare module` verbatim (respectExternal: true), so this subpath must exist in the PUBLISHED package.json too. The `bun` per-file emit stays for white-box test execution. `config-source` is dev-only (absent from publishConfig, where this subpath collapses onto ./dist/index.* like the reference `.`).
